parsed_review.summary: CP00-608 is a clean descriptor-only closeout candidate for the RP19.P09 permission-audit fixture bridge (M05 tail S18-S20 + M06 head S01-S07, 10 RP19 units, risk A). The pack does not claim runtime production readiness: manifest reports production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status=in_progress, and the production_ready_flag denotes descriptor verification only. Plan fidelity is exact: CP608_PACK_BINDING (registry.js:426), contract current_pack (contract:16), baseline, manifest, and the live closeout-pack-plan.json (plan:405) all agree on range, counts, upstream CP00-607, and next CP00-609/RP19.P09.M06.S08, contiguous with CP607's M05 first-17-rows. Deliverable {implementation:4,claude_review:2,security_audit:2,test:1,ui:1} and micro-phase {M05:3,M06:7} distributions match across requirements, plan units, and tests. All descriptor rows carry descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, customer_safe_errors_only=true, raw_payload_included=false; the no-write attestation chains CP583->...->CP608 with every write/runtime/audit/hermes-receipt flag false. Authority boundary holds: claude_is_final_approval=false and enterprise-trust-from-local-validation=false, enforced by validators.js:4611-4618; Hermes appears only as deterministic evidence-packet/receipt descriptors with no product runtime. All 7 required exports exist and are wired through index.js; model.test.js and validate-rp19-client-portal-core-contract.mjs assert coverage, descriptor-only rows, contract deep-equality, and handoff; freeze helpers are pure with no fs/network/exec anywhere in packages/client-portal/src. All pre-review commands in command-evidence.json exit 0. No P0/P1/P2 issues. One non-blocking P3 transparency note: the post-review evidence artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) and the two deferred validations (closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate) are not yet present at read-only review time, which is expected per the hardening sequence and must be generated/passed before commit. Claude acted strictly as a read-only independent reviewer and is not the final approver.

findings.title: Post-review evidence artifacts and two deferred validations not yet present at read-only review time
findings.details: The manifest lists claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json as required_pack_artifacts/evidence_refs (manifest.json:500-513), but only manifest.json and command-evidence.json exist under docs/closeout-packs/cp00-608/ at review time. Likewise, command-evidence.json omits `npm run closeout-pack-plan:validate` and `npm run closeout-pack:validate` from its passed-command list. Per command-evidence.json:82-83 and the pack_level_claude_review.hardening_sequence, these artifacts are generated and the two validations rerun after this read-only review and before commit (queue regeneration advances the cursor to CP00-609). This is expected sequencing rather than a pack defect, but it means adjudication and construction-inspection cannot be independently verified by this review and are taken on the documented deferred-step basis.
findings.recommendation: Before committing CP00-608, generate claude-review-result.json (from this review verdict), adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, then rerun npm run closeout-pack-plan:validate, npm run closeout-pack:validate, and git diff --check so the closeout evidence set is complete and consistent with the manifest evidence_refs.
findings.post_review_disposition: Non-blocking; expected deferred post-review steps. Orchestrator must produce the three evidence artifacts and pass the two deferred validations before final closeout/commit.
